25:I[47747,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js","/_next/static/chunks/09-wudx97fkxd.js","/_next/static/chunks/0-jky29l4b79z.js","/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js"],"CodeBlock"]

2b:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
2d:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Capabilities"}]
8:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Term matching"}],": Exact word and phrase search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Boolean logic"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"AND"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"OR"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"NOT"}]," operators"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Prefix search"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"data*"}]," matches \"database\", \"datastore\""]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranking"}],": BM25-based relevance scoring"]}],"\n"]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How FTS5 is Used"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":["FTS5 search is performed automatically as part of the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," method. There is no separate ",["$","code",null,{"children":"text_search()"}]," API. The FTS5 index is queried internally and its results are fused with vector search results."]}]
b:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\n\nmem = Mnemosyne()\n\n# recall() internally performs vector + FTS5 hybrid search\nresults = mem.recall(\"database migration strategy\", top_k=5)\n","language":"python"}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"BM25 Ranking"}]
d:["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 uses BM25 for relevance scoring:"}]
e:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"score = log(N / df) * (f * (k1 + 1)) / (f + k1 * (1 - b + b * dl / avgdl))\n","language":"python"}]
f:["$","p",null,{"children":"Where:"}]
10:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"N"}],": Total documents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"df"}],": Documents containing term"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"f"}],": Term frequency in document"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"dl"}],": Document length"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"avgdl"}],": Average document length"]}],"\n"]}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Integration with Hybrid Search"}]
12:["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 scores are normalized and fused with vector scores using configurable weighting:"}]
13:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Vector score"}],": weight 0.5 (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"vec_weight"}]," parameter in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"FTS5 score"}],": weight 0.3 (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_weight"}]," parameter in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance"}],": weight 0.2 (configurable via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_weight"}]," parameter in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","p",null,{"children":["These weights are per-query configurable through the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"recall()"}]," API. See the ",["$","a",null,{"href":"/retrieval/configurable-scoring","children":"Configurable Scoring"}]," guide for details."]}]
15:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Performance"}]
16:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Query Type"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Latency"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Single term"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"5ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Quick lookup"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Phrase"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Exact match"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Boolean"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Complex filter"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Prefix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"15ms"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Autocomplete"}]]}]]}]]}]
17:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Index Schema"}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":"Two separate FTS5 virtual tables are maintained:"}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"fts_episodes (synced to Episodic Memory)"}]
1a:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"-- Synced to the episodic_memory table via triggers\nCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE fts_episodes USING fts5(\n  content,\n  source,\n  content='episodic_memory'\n);\n\n-- Triggers keep fts_episodes in sync with episodic_memory\nCREATE TRIGGER episodic_ai AFTER INSERT ON episodic_memory BEGIN\n  INSERT INTO fts_episodes(rowid, content, source)\n  VALUES (new.id, new.content, new.source);\nEND;\nCREATE TRIGGER episodic_ad AFTER DELETE ON episodic_memory BEGIN\n  INSERT INTO fts_episodes(fts_episodes, rowid, content, source)\n  VALUES ('delete', old.id, old.content, old.source);\nEND;\n","language":"sql"}]
1b:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"fts_working (standalone for Working Memory)"}]
1c:["$","$L25",null,{"code":"-- Standalone FTS5 index for working memory\n-- Uses content= option to avoid duplicating data\nCREATE VIRTUAL TABLE fts_working USING fts5(\n  id UNINDEXED,\n  content,\n  content='',\n);\n","language":"sql"}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_episodes"}]," index mirrors the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," fields from the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"episodic_memory"}]," table and stays synchronized via triggers. The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fts_working"}]," index is standalone with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id UNINDEXED"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," columns. FTS5 indices are maintained automatically — no manual rebuild is required."]}]
1e:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L26",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"SQLite Version"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"FTS5 requires SQLite 3.45 or higher. Mnemosyne checks this at initialization and raises a clear error if your SQLite version is too old."}]}]]}]]}]}]
1f:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01o_465-h6ryu.js","async":true,"nonce":"$undefined"}]
